selectInfoParent: Parents have always strived to educate their children, because this is the basis of evolution. Assigning tasks to children is a key element of education. The more assignments, the more experience and knowledge they gain. Experience gained through practice and assignments promotes the development of critical thinking and problem-solving skills. It also helps children better understand the world around them, preparing them for future challenges. Education through experience creates comprehensively developed and independent individuals
selectInfoKid: If a child wants to become smart, he needs to actively ask questions to his parents about how to perform various activities and solve problems. He should strive to receive more complex tasks that will help him develop and improve. Parents, in turn, are obliged to support and encourage the child’s desire for knowledge. They should create conditions for his learning, help him learn new skills and share experience. This includes not only learning practical skills, but also developing the ability to earn money and gain life experience. This approach will help the child become more independent and successful in the future
name: Name
deadline: ⏰ Set a deadline that is a challenge, matching it to the child's energy and the task's difficulty. Allow more time for learning new things and less for familiar routines
selectDescription: Parents assign tasks, inspect their completion, and reward their children accordingly. This fosters diligence, integrity, responsibility, and a sense of pride in their daily lives, instilling a sense of accomplishment in parenting

multiTaskDescription:
Allows you to create tasks repeated daily (e.g. brushing teeth, cleaning, homework).
This way the child sees that the task returns every day, and the parent can easily check if it has been completed.
singleTaskDescription:
Allows you to create one-time tasks (e.g. buying a gift, helping in the garden, extra exercise).
This way the child sees a clearly defined task to complete, and the parent can quickly check if it has been done.

priceStatusDescription:
This is the suggested reward for the task.
You can
✔ accept it
or
💬 suggest a change and send it to your parent.
🤝 Try to reach a mutual decision together
inProgressStatusDescription:
Before you click, check if the task is truly well done.
Did you do everything that was needed ✔
and according to the requirements?
If so — click 🚀
⏳ Now it's time for review and your reward
weakResult: Your work received a lower grade today, but treat it like training – next time you'll step onto the field with new knowledge and give it your all! Don't give up, you have great potential within you.
goodResult: Your work was rated fantastically! It was a true showcase of your skills – you crossed the finish line like a champion. It's clear you put a lot of heart and effort into this. You're on a great path, keep it up!
middleResult: Your work is solid and shows you know the basics, but I know you're capable of even more! It's a 'halfway there' result – you have a good foundation, now just add a few more details to jump onto the top podium next time.
completeStatusDescription: Mission accomplished! The task is settled and closed. You can breathe a sigh of relief and move on to something completely different – you’ve earned a little break before the next start!
whyYouNeedDreams:
Go for what truly brings you joy ✨ — not everything has to be another thing. Sometimes time with loved ones, laughter, and memories are worth more than any gadgets.
Keep it simple and care about the world 🌱 — then your wishes will mean even more
canSeeAndAddToTasks: {} can see and add this wish to your tasks
whyYouNeedEarn: Saving gives you freedom 🕊️ and the means to reach your dream goals 🎯. With a safety net 🛡️, you avoid stress, and small amounts turn into a real fortune 💰 over time! You learn patience and discipline 🧠, which is a true superpower ⚡ in adult life. Instead of taking loans and living under the thumb of debt ⛓️, you rule your money 👑 and can invest in your growth or passions 🚀 without asking anyone for permission.
howToEarnAdvice1: Every time you get any money (from family, helping a neighbor, or allowance), immediately put a set amount (e.g., every $5 or 20%) into a jar that you don't open. The rest is yours to spend. If you don't do it right away, the money will just 'disappear' on small things! 💸
howToEarnAdvice2: Before buying something on impulse, put it back on the shelf and go home. Give yourself two days. If you're still thinking about it after 48 hours and feel it's necessary – go back and buy it. You'll be surprised how often the urge completely disappears once you're home! 🧠
howToEarnAdvice3: Empty your pockets of small coins every evening (e.g., all $1 or $2 coins). Drop them into a container that's hard to open. It might seem like a small amount, but after a month, you'll have enough for pizza or a movie without even feeling like you were saving! 📈
howToEarnAdvice4: This is the easiest way to get real cash. Instead of buying drinks and snacks at the school cafeteria every day, make sandwiches at home and bring a reusable water bottle. Put the money you 'would have spent' straight into your savings. It's pure profit every day! 🍔➡️💰
howToEarnAdvice5: Draw a 'goal thermometer' or a progress bar on a piece of paper (e.g., 'New Headphones') and hang it above your desk. Every time you add to your savings, color in a part of the bar. Seeing yourself get physically closer to your goal is a huge boost and stops you from wasting money! 🏁✨
someAdvicesBelow: 💡 Check out these 5 pro-tips below to help you save for your dreams! 👇✨
pennyTip: 💡 Remember: take care of the pennies, and the pounds will take care of themselves! 💰

parentPriceStatusDescription:
This is a reward proposal for the completed task.
You can:
✔ Approve it, if you find it appropriate.
💬 Suggest a change, to better align it with your household rules.
🤝 Remember, the best results come from mutual decisions! A quick chat will help you reach a compromise that satisfies both sides.
parentInProgressStatusDescription:
💡 Quick tip: If the task is taking longer than expected, you can send a gentle reminder or ask if they need any help.
🤝 Patience pays off: Give your child space to be independent – the satisfaction from a job well done will be even greater!
payForIt:
Time to settle up! 💳
The task has been reviewed, so now it’s time for the best part – giving the reward.

📌 Why does it matter? Paying on time builds trust and teaches your child that honest work always leads to the promised result.

🚀 Motivation: By settling up promptly, you show respect for your child's effort. This encourages them to take on next challenges with even more enthusiasm!
taskCompletedParentDescription:
Mission accomplished! 🚀 The task is settled and closed. ✅
You can breathe a sigh of relief – your role as a mentor is complete. ☕ Great job! You’ve earned a moment of rest before the next joint liftoff! ✨
addToHistoryDescription:
Add this achievement to history! 📜
It’s worth keeping this success for the record.

📈 Track progress: Build a success story for your child to see how much they’ve grown.

📸 Memories: Every closed task is a small step towards great habits.
taskTypeDescription: Selecting the task type will later show which types of activities your child enjoys more and what motivates them the most.
taskExpDescription: Earning points for tasks builds a sense of progress. It allows the child to see their skill level "level up," turning everyday chores into an engaging game.
addPhotoDescription:
📸 Add a photo to make everything clear!
A picture is worth a thousand words. Adding a photo helps your child better understand the task's goal and shows precisely what result you expect. It's a great way to learn through observation and build confidence in your little explorer!
wishesIsSacred: A wish list is more than just items – it’s a window into your child's passions and dreams 🌟 By treating these requests with respect, you build a foundation of trust and make them feel heard. Use this as a lesson in responsibility: instead of a simple 'yes' or 'no,' give your child the space to actively earn their goal through daily tasks! 🚀💪
daysSliderDescription:
Find the right balance! ⚖️
Match the days to the task's difficulty while focusing on consistency. Short deadlines frustrate, while long ones lose focus. Build habits through a sweet spot, turning regularity into your child's natural routine. 🌱
yourKidsDescription:
Add child! New features coming soon ⏳
Now, please wait for your child to accept the invitation and confirm that you are their parent. Once they do, you'll get full access: you can start adding tasks, adjusting the day duration, and making dreams come true together! 👋
setDayDurationDescription:
Daily rhythm is the key to stability ⏰
A consistent routine provides security and better rest. Be a guide, not just a judge, in building these habits. Use our charts to track your child's progress in morning and evening discipline. It’s a simple way to build life-long healthy routines! 📊
searchingEmailDescription: You will see the child on your list, and once they accept the invitation, you will be able to assign them tasks and track their progress.
whyNeedAdDescription: Every day we see hundreds of ads that we can't control... but what if YOU decided what your child sees? 😊 Inspire them! Send them an 'ad' for playing the guitar 🎸 or a healthy lifestyle 🥗. When your child adds it to their wishlist ✅ – congratulations! You've just sparked a new, meaningful passion in them! 🌟
adsListTitle: Your child, your values – become the 'Creative Director' of your child's world! 🎨
adDurationDescription: Ads are set for a specific duration and will disappear once the time is up ⏱️. However, you can swap an active ad for a new one at any time! 🔄
addTaskExitDescription: If you leave now, you'll lose the entered data and your child won't receive this wonderful task! Are you sure you want to discard your changes? 😱
yourParentsDescription: When your parent adds you to their list, you need to confirm it ✅. This way, your parent can assign you tasks, and you can share your wishes with them!
setNewPasswordDescription: Your identity has been verified. You can now change your password
quitRegistrationDescription: Go ahead and take care of what you need! We've got you covered, and you can pick up right where you left off next time. See you in a bit!
addToHistoryQuestionDescription_en:
Keeping a task history is the key to efficiency and growth. There are three reasons why it's worth doing:

💾 Memory and proof of work: It acts as "external memory" – allowing you to quickly check project details and providing black-and-white proof of your achievements to your boss or client.

📊 Smarter planning: By analyzing the completion time of past tasks, you can estimate future deadlines more accurately and avoid repeating the same mistakes.

✅ Motivation: Looking back at the list of completed tasks gives you a sense of progress and a boost of energy for further action.
emptyList: Your history list is still empty
noResults: No entries match the selected criteria
dayDurationDescription:
� How do charts help in care?

� Quick change detection: Instantly spot unusual shortening or lengthening of the day.

� Daily rhythm: Weekly averages help better adjust sleep, study, and meal times to your child's needs.

⚖️ Realistic expectations: See the exact difference between the plan and reality, allowing you to fine-tune the home schedule.

� Parent's peace of mind: Monitor trends over the whole month without constant micromanagement or questioning your child.
